content: Release execution for 0.1.2: npm already has @archmap/core 0.1.0 and 0.1.1, so this verified release is being prepared as 0.1.2 rather than rewriting public 0.1.1. Updated package.json/package-lock.json, ARCHMAP_VERSION, and pinned CDN documentation/examples to 0.1.2. Verification after the bump: npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npm test (196 passing), npm run verify:pattern-samples (96 renders, 0 failures), and npm pack --dry-run with tmp npm cache/logs (tarball archmap-core-0.1.2.tgz, 67 files). Existing untracked reports/ left untouched. Release caveat: origin/main and local main still have unrelated histories; use a non-rewriting merge or release branch/tag path, never force-move v0.1.1.
